title: ipomoea bilobata var. emarginata
intro: Ipomoea bilobata var. emarginata, also known as the Bilobed Morning Glory, is a variety of flowering plant native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ipomoea bilobata var. emarginata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
